channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ex-Workday CEO says his career took off after changing his attitude, and Amazon's Andy Jassy uses the same mindset trick
item.description: Gen Z may feel AI is blocking their career progress, but the former Workday CEO says attitude could be the real obstacle.

item.title: Low-budget YouTuber films outperform Star Wars at the box office, signaling a potential turning point
item.description: Backrooms, directed and co-written by YouTube creator Kane Parsons, was made for just $10 million.

item.title: Nobel laureate Joe Stiglitz says AI will make tech elites even richer while potentially eliminating jobs
item.description: Stiglitz told Fortune that tech advocates pushing for smaller government are also promoting AI that could displace workers.

item.title: Peter Thiel says AI threatens technical jobs more than creative roles, challenging the STEM safety net
item.description: A LinkedIn report backs some of Thiel's claims, noting job postings for 'storytellers' have doubled in the past year.
